calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Arnold W. Evje II, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Anthony Terry, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Greg Babineau.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 24, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three (3) Day Notice ot Pay Rent of Quit dated 03/13/08------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant GREG BABINEAU as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic shall recover from defendant GREG BABINEAU Rent/Per Diem Damages in the sum of $1,137.80, and Costs in the amount of $195.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $1,1332.80.

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 440 Eddy Street, #203, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Off Calendar
